data.author: marcoag
data.message:
Update to 1.8.3. (#29)

data.author: mjcarroll
data.message:
Remove set but unused variable (#24)

Clang checks -Wunused-but-set-variable.
This fails the build with -Werror also enabled.

Signed-off-by: Michael Carroll <michael@openrobotics.org>

data.author: paudrow
data.message:
Update maintainers to Audrow Nash (#18)

Signed-off-by: Audrow Nash <audrow@hey.com>

data.author: nuclearsandwich
data.message:
Add git buildtool dependency.

Since we normally install git as part of our regular development
workflow this build tool dependency is often overlooked. However doing
cursed things with containers I stumbled upon the need for git during
the build stage.

Signed-off-by: Steven! Ragnarök <steven@nuclearsandwich.com>

data.author: sloretz
data.message:
Use git hash for google_benchmark_vendor (#20)

CMake ExternalProject_add recommends using a specific git hash with
GIT_TAG because branches and tags can be updated to point to different
references.

https://cmake.org/cmake/help/latest/module/ExternalProject.html

Signed-off-by: Shane Loretz <sloretz@osrfoundation.org>

data.author: homalozoa
data.message:
Update google_benchmark to v1.5.3 (#16)

1. Change google_benchmark version from v1.5.2 to v1.5.3. Because v1.5.2
   can not build with GCC 11
2. Removed shrink-tz-offset-size.patch because of this patch was merged in
google-benchmark repo.

Signed-off-by: Homalozoa <nx.tardis@gmail.com>
